HGSS.453.0000:
Have you visited Pewter Gym?\f
The Gym Leader uses
Rock-type Pokémon.
HGSS.453.0001:
At night, CLEFAIRY come out to play
at Mt. Moon.\f
But not every night.
HGSS.453.0002:
Ah, you came all the way out here
from Johto?\f
That brings back memories.\f
When I was young, I went to Johto
to train.\f
You remind me so much of what I was
like as a young man.\f
Here. I want you to have this item
I found in Johto.\f
HGSS.453.0005:
Going to new, unknown places and
seeing new people...\r
Those are the joys of travel.
HGSS.453.0006:
Steven: It seems that LATIOS became
attracted to it in no time!\f
HGSS.453.0007:
Steven: It seems that LATIAS became
attracted to it in no time!\f
HGSS.453.0008:
I can feel that LATIOS is full of
fighting spirit!\f
I would love to challenge it,
but I will let you go for it!
HGSS.453.0009:
I can feel that LATIAS is full of
fighting spirit!\f
I would love to challenge it,
but I will let you go for it!
HGSS.453.0012: LATIOS flew away to the distant sky...\f
HGSS.453.0013: LATIAS flew away to the distant sky...\f
HGSS.453.0014:
Steven: Impressive!
It was a great battle!\f
I don’t think you had to give
everything you’ve got,\r
and that scares me...\f
HGSS.453.0015:
I’ve been away from the Hoenn
Pokémon League for too long.\f
I’ll have to excuse myself.\f
..................\f
Oh, I never got your name.\r
...But I won’t ask for it this time.\f
Our fun will have to wait for the
right time.\f
HGSS.453.0016:
Steven: Impressive!
It was a great battle!\f
LATIOS will be back once it recovers
to make amends for the defeat.\f
HGSS.453.0017:
Steven: Impressive!
It was a great battle!\f
LATIAS will be back once it recovers
to make amends for the defeat.\f
HGSS.453.0018:
Steven: I see.
You’d rather hide your true strength\r
from me. You have room to breathe,\r
and that scares me.\f
HGSS.453.0019:
Steven: What? You are not scared,
are you? Don’t be reserved. Go for it.
HGSS.453.0021:
Pewter City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Brock\r
The Rock-Solid Pokémon Trainer
